allow: Bash(python -c "import json; cache=json.load\(open\(''cache_alunos_todos_diarios.json''\)\); print\(''Total diários:'', len\(cache\)\); counts=[\(k, len\(v\)\) for k,v in cache.items\(\)]; print\(''Exemplo:'', counts[0] if counts else ''vazio''\)")
Bash(python -c "import json; c=json.load\(open\(''cache_alunos_todos_diarios.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); v=c.get\(''8002'',[]\); print\(len\(v\)\); print\(v[0] if v else ''vazio''\)")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\(''alunos.db''\); rows=c.execute\(''SELECT numero_chamada, nome FROM alunos_diario WHERE id_turma = ""389"" ORDER BY numero_chamada''\).fetchall\(\); c.close\(\); print\(f''Turma 389: {len\(rows\)} alunos''\); [print\(f''  Nº {r[0]}: {r[1]}''\) for r in rows if ''EDUARDO'' in r[1]]")
